sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105989" key="turhni/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυρηνίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a Persian plaster, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.15</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
